name: Turkey
stopoverNote: Istanbul (IST) — Turkish Airlines hub with cheapest Europe connections from India. Free Turkish Airlines hotel on long layovers. Excellent for India ↔ Europe stopovers.

cities.name: Istanbul
cities.notes: Hagia Sophia, Grand Bazaar, Bosphorus cruise and spice market

cities.name: Cappadocia
cities.notes: Hot air balloon at sunrise over fairy chimneys and cave hotel stay

cities.name: Pamukkale
cities.notes: White travertine calcium terraces and ancient Hierapolis spa city

cities.name: Ephesus
cities.notes: Remarkably preserved 2000-year-old Roman city with Library of Celsus

cities.name: Bodrum
cities.notes: Crusader castle, Blue Voyage gulet charters and beach clubs

cities.name: Antalya
cities.notes: Turkish Riviera old harbour, Roman Hadrian's Gate and waterfall coast
